title: newtonia elliotii
intro: Newtonia elliotii, also known as the Newtonia or Elliot's Newtonia, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits associated with Newtonia elliotii include its potential to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Newtonia elliotii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
